releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This version simplifies the Slider, to use the native `setDesc` to show the slider's value, instead of adding a new tooltip.

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/05843469-251d-4df3-82dd-b7ca81cc537a)


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/gsarig/obsidian-varinote/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This version addresses the feedback on both the Obsidian review process, and the user feedback on [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/ObsidianMD/comments/1gzkpyi/comment/lz2kpwl/).
More specifically, adds support for the following additional fields:
* Dropdown
* Slider
* Toggle

Also, it adds support for basic calculations.

You can read more on the [Advanced usage](https://github.com/gsarig/obsidian-varinote?tab=readme-ov-file#advanced-usage) section of the README.

![varinote-bon-appetit.gif](.github/assets/varinote-bon-appetit.gif)
